# GDL Stone Snow LLC

> Landscaping, masonry, and snow removal company serving the Minneapolis-St. Paul metro area since 2003.

## About
GDL Stone Snow LLC is a family-owned landscaping, masonry, and snow removal company based in Bloomington, Minnesota. Founded in 2003 by Fernando Floersch, the company provides residential and commercial outdoor property services throughout the Twin Cities metropolitan area. With over 23 years of experience, GDL Stone Snow is licensed, fully insured, and committed to quality workmanship and customer satisfaction. The company has served over 500 clients including large corporations such as Pinnacle Properties, Caspian Group, Sherman & Associates, Walser Corporation, and RMK Management.

## Contact
- Business Name: GDL Stone Snow LLC
- Address: 1000 W. 94th St, Bloomington, MN 55420
- Office Phone: (952) 882-6182
- Sales Phone: (612) 236-6190
- Email: camoren000@gmail.com
- Website: https://gdlstonesnow.com
- Hours: Always Open — 24/7 emergency services available

## Services

### Landscaping
Full-service landscape design, installation, and maintenance for residential and commercial properties throughout the Twin Cities. Includes garden design, planting, hardscaping, retaining walls, outdoor living spaces, drainage solutions, and seasonal cleanups.

### Lawn Care
Complete lawn care programs for commercial and residential properties including mowing, edging, fertilization, weed control, aeration, overseeding, dethatching, and seasonal maintenance.

### Masonry & Stone Work
Expert masonry and stone work services including patios, walkways, retaining walls, fire pits, outdoor fireplaces, stone veneer, brick work, and decorative stone installations.

### Irrigation
Sprinkler system design, installation, repair, and maintenance. Includes winterization, spring startup, and smart irrigation controller installation.

### Snow Removal
Reliable commercial and residential snow removal services with 24/7 emergency response. Includes plowing, shoveling, snow hauling, and de-icing for parking lots, driveways, sidewalks, and building entrances.

### Ice Management
Professional ice management and prevention services including salt and sand application, liquid de-icer treatments, and anti-icing programs for commercial properties.

## Service Area
GDL Stone Snow LLC serves the following cities and communities in the Minneapolis-St. Paul metro area:
- Bloomington, MN (headquarters)
- Minneapolis, MN
- St. Paul, MN
- Edina, MN
- Richfield, MN
- Burnsville, MN
- Eagan, MN
- Eden Prairie, MN
- Minnetonka, MN
- And surrounding communities in the Twin Cities metro area
